---
name: 📚 Documentation Issue
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## 📍 Location

Which document needs improvement?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Setup Guide
- [ ] Other: _______

**File path or URL:** 

## 🤔 What's Unclear?

What part of the documentation is confusing or incomplete?

## 💡 Suggested Fix

How would you improve the documentation?

**Example:** Add code snippet, clarify wording, add diagram, etc.

## 🔧 Difficulty

How difficult would it be to fix this?

- [ ] Easy (1-2 hours)
- [ ] Medium (2-5 hours)
- [ ] Hard (5+ hours)

## 🏷️ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the documentation carefully
- [ ] Another issue doesn't already address this
- [ ] I have described what's unclear
- [ ] I have suggested a specific improvement
